mapper.select: /* adm-master-timezone-sql-oracle.xml - selectTimezoneDtl */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,TB1.TZKEY AS TZKEY ,TB2.CONTINENTCD AS CONTINENTCD ,TB2.CNTRYCD AS CNTRYCD ,TB2.CITYCD AS CITYCD ,TB2.DISPLAYMSG AS DISPLAYMSG ,TB2.INSERTDATE AS INSERTDATE ,TB2.UPDATEDATE AS UPDATEDATE ,TB2.INSERTURKEY ,TB2.UPDATEURKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_TZ_HD TB1 INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_TZ_DT TB2 ON TB1.TZKEY = TB2.TZKEY WHERE TB1.TZKEY = #{tzkey} ORDER BY UPDATEDATE DESC

/* adm-master-timezone-sql-oracle.xml - selectTimezoneCountDtl */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_TZ_HD TB1 INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_TZ_DT TB2 ON TB1.TZKEY = TB2.TZKEY WHERE 1 = 1
AND TB1.TZKEY = #{tzkey}
